subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The reality of Divinity is an exalted and impenetrable mystery, a pure and indescribable Essence, detached from all conception [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی حقیقت الوهیت غیب منیع لایدرک ذات بحت لایوصف منقطع الوجدانی بتصور
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @duration of the Baha'i cycle; future divine revelations
